},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7141646928169255688","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的真的超级好看（虽然专业知识看不太懂，但不妨碍他NB啊）。男主凭借自己的努力，对知识的渴望，科学的求知精神令人敬佩，而且价值观很正，感谢作者让我在番茄里面看到了这么好看的书[爱心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662794366,"group_id":"7081245197832555532","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"他还没想好该怎么简介","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6o6yqMQk0PBscHl0c1/02MeTNhPbOufDK3yOH543FOX","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a02f7325f15b43cd8a5565292a6a097e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792100&x-signature=YwVxHAiin3M9jJpCaAfCZt%2BIpgo%3D","user_id":"3856734770439501","user_name":"爱吃江如龙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3856734770439501","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1703941648,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7081245197832555532","book_info":{"abstract":"你拿过奖学金吗？

"comment_id":"7100159642088522537","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好很好，这本书的主角不像别的主角一样拥有系统，但是主角依然靠着自己的努力，夺得金牌，保送北大，加入少年班。这也是我看的少数没有跳章的书，情感很真挚，可以看出作者是用心写的。本书有大量的真题，还有解答方式和答案。说不定作者也是个学霸[思考][思考][思考]。在本书，主角也不是全能的，也会遇到挫折，但主角可以克服挫折，这大概就是他能成功的原因吧。还有非常非常重要的一点，这本书里面有好多大量的好词好句可以积累，看的时候记得在身旁放一个小本本和一支笔哦。感情线目前不清楚，不过我希望是陈依依，谢谢作者，作者加油啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1653134892,"group_id":"7081245197832555532","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8qOMkbAa9TDoywkAa5kPDfl//6bqMJDus87B+g4+Mho","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/160ae1a61cf94ab290650703016a4008~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796675&x-signature=OdSAEbciUKWDBZW36P9awLq0dA4%3D","user_id":"1028793034606924","user_name":"苏南i"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1028793034606924","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7081245197832555532","book_info":{"abstract":"你拿过奖学金吗？
